sections.content:

# Check if any other objects changed
print("All nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} hash={n['hash'][:8]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
